panels.title: Error Rate
panels.description: Percentage of HTTP responses with 4xx/5xx status codes

panels.title: Avg Slippage %
panels.description: Average price slippage from limit to fill price

panels.title: Queue Depth (Saturation)
panels.description: Number of anomaly analysis requests queued for LLM processing

panels.title: Availability (99.9% SLO)
panels.description: Percentage of successful requests over total. SLO target: 99.9%

panels.title: Latency SLO (95% < 500ms)
panels.description: Percentage of requests completing under 500ms. SLO target: 95%

panels.title: Error Budget Remaining
panels.description: Remaining error budget before SLO breach. Negative = SLO violated

panels.title: Error Burn Rate (Multi-Window)
panels.description: Multi-window burn rate tracks how fast error budget is being consumed

panels.title: Login Success Rate
panels.description: Ratio of successful logins to total login attempts

panels.title: Trade Value (USD/1h)
panels.description: Total USD value of trades executed in the last hour

title: KrystalineX Unified Observability 2026
description: Institutional-grade observability for KrystalineX crypto exchange · Real-time SLOs, business KPIs, and infrastructure health
